pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-war-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s04/FormP.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s09/Loops.general_idea: Replace deprecated Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s10/BuyNu.general_idea: Replace session.invalidate() with request.logout() to use the standard Servlet 6.0 API for logging out users.
src/main/java/com/example/jees/s10/BuyNu.why_exists: session.invalidate() does not log out the user in modern Servlet containers; request.logout() is the correct API for user logout.

src/main/java/com/example/jees/s10/Greet.general_idea: Replace session invalidation with request logout for proper security context cleanup.
